    fun x ↦ by simp [c, L.map_sum, L.map_smul, mul_comm]
  simp only [hc]
  -- We have variance of a sum of independent centered variables
  have hindep : iIndepFun (fun _ ↦ inferInstance) (fun i x ↦ c i * x i) (Measure.pi fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) := by
    apply iIndepFun.mul_left
    exact iIndepFun_fin_pi (fun _ ↦ inferInstance) (fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1)
  rw [variance_sum_right hindep]
  · simp_rw [variance_mul_const, variance_id_gaussianReal_zero_one, mul_one]
  · intro i; simp
  · intro i; apply Integrable.const_mul; rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1
  · intro i; apply Integrable.const_mul; rw [← memLp_two_iff_integrable_sq]; exact memLp_two_gaussianReal_zero_one

    · have : (∫ x, x ∂gaussianReal 0 1) = 0 := integral_id_gaussianReal
      rw [← this]
      convert integral_eval_pi (i := i) (f := id) ?_ using 2
      · simp
      · infer_instance
      · rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1
      simp
    · exact (measurable_pi_apply i).aestronglyMeasurable
    · exact (measurable_pi_apply j).aestronglyMeasurable
    · convert integrable_eval_pi (i := i) (f := id) ?_ <;> first | simp | infer_instance | rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1
    · convert integrable_eval_pi (i := j) (f := id) ?_ <;> first | simp | infer_instance | rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1

rw [variance, isCentered_stdGaussianMulti, sub_zero, stdGaussianMulti,
    integral_map _ (by fun_prop)]
  swap
  · simp only [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul]
    apply MemLp.integrable_sq
    refine MemLp.finset_sum _ fun i _ ↦ MemLp.mul_const ?_ _
    convert (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).comp (measurable_pi_apply i)
  simp only [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [← variance_eq_integral_sq_of_integral_eq_zero]
  · rw [variance_sum]
    · congr with i
      rw [variance_mul_const, variance_def, gaussianReal_integral_one, sub_zero, mul_one]
      rw [integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).integrable_sq]
      rw [← variance_def, gaussianReal_variance_one]
    · intro i _; apply MemLp.mul_const
      convert (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).comp (measurable_pi_apply i)
    · apply pairwise_indepFun_of_iIndepFun
      exact (iIndepFun_pi _).comp (fun i ↦ measurable_id.mul_const _)
  · rw [integral_finset_sum]
    · simp only [integral_mul_const]
      refine Finset.sum_eq_zero fun i _ ↦ ?_
      rw [integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1).integrable, gaussianReal_integral_one, mul_zero]
    · intro i _; apply Integrable.mul_const
      exact integrable_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1).integrable

rw [stdGaussianMulti, variance_map]
  rotate_left; · exact (Finset.measurable_sum _ (by fun_prop)).aemeasurable
  have : L ∘ (fun x ↦ ∑ i, x i • stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i) =
      fun x ↦ ∑ i, x i * L (stdOrthonormalBasis ℝ E i) := by
    ext; simp [map_sum, map_smul]
  rw [this, variance_sum_right]
  · congr with i
    rw [mul_comm, variance_mul_const, variance_eq_integral_sq_of_integral_eq_zero]
    · rw [integral_eval_pi, integral_sq_id_gaussianReal]; simp
      rw [← memLp_two_iff_integrable_sq_norm]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 2
    · rw [integral_eval_pi, integral_id_gaussianReal]
      · rfl
      · rw [← memLp_one_iff_integrable]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 1
  · apply iIndepFun.comp (iIndepFun_eval_pi _ _); intro; fun_prop
  · intro i; rw [mul_comm]; apply Memℒp.const_mul
    rw [memLp_two_iff_integrable_sq_norm]; simp [norm_eq_abs, Real.rpow_two]
    apply integrable_eval_pi
    rw [← memLp_two_iff_integrable_sq_norm]; exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 2

rw [stdGaussianMulti, variance_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp only [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul, Function.comp_def]
  rw [variance_sum]
  · congr with i
    rw [variance_mul_const, mul_one]
    rw [variance_def, integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).integrable_sq,
      integral_eval_pi (memLp_id_gaussianReal 1).integrable, ← variance_def,
      variance_gaussianReal zero_le_one]
  · refine iIndepFun.pairwise_indepFun (iIndepFun.mul_left (iIndepFun_pi ?_) _)
    exact fun i ↦ (gaussianReal 0 1).measurable_id'
  · intro i
    apply MemLp.const_mul
    rw [memLp_two_iff_integrable_sq]
    apply integrable_eval_pi
    exact (memLp_id_gaussianReal 2).integrable_sq

rw [stdGaussianMulti]
  -- Change variable to the product space
  rw [variance_def, integral_map (by fun_prop).aemeasurable (by fun_prop).aemeasurable,
    integral_map (by fun_prop).aemeasurable (by fun_prop).aemeasurable, ← variance_def]
  simp only [map_sum, map_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  -- Use independence
  rw [variance_sum_right]
  · congr with i
    rw [variance_mul_const]
    -- Identify the variance of a single coordinate
    have h_map : (Measure.pi (fun _ : Fin _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1)).map (fun x ↦ x i) = gaussianReal 0 1 :=
      Measure.map_pi (fun _ ↦ gaussianReal 0 1) i
    rw [variance_def, integral_map (by fun_prop).aemeasurable (by fun_prop).aemeasurable,
      integral_map (by fun_prop).aemeasurable (by fun_prop).aemeasurable, ← variance_def]
    rw [h_map, variance_gaussianReal 0 one_ne_zero, mul_one]
  · exact iIndepFun.comp (iIndepFun_pi _) _ (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
  · intro i
    apply MemLp.mul_const
    rw [memLp_iff_map_memLp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), Measure.map_pi]
    exact memLp_id_gaussianReal 2
